issue.message: Accessing internal APIs via reflection is not supported and may not work on all devices or in the future

Attribute `windowLayoutInDisplayCutoutMode` is only used in API level 27 and higher (current min is 26)

issue.errorLine1: <string name="status_source_pending_items">%d sources waiting for first sync</string>

issue.message: Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `ClashManager` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak

Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
issue.errorLine1: val parsed = runCatching { android.net.Uri.parse(candidate) }.getOrNull() ?: return null

issue.message: Use the KTX function `createBitmap` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `Canvas.withSave` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
